'''''Adarga''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] used to defend the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] development plant in the [[Parmel system/Legends|Parmel system]].

==History==
During the revolt of [[Demetrius Zaarin]], ''Adarga'' was attacked by TIE Defenders and [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport]]s loyal to the rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]]. Through the efforts of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and other [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] loyalists, the Zaarinist force was repulsed and ''Adarga'' was preserved. Despite this, the fight was a strategic victory for Zaarin, for such was the damage suffered by ''Adarga'' that it was ordered out of the system. This act forced Imperial troops to likewise abandon the TIE Defender plant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
